artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Plagiatul reprezintă însușirea ideilor, a metodelor, a procedurilor, a tehnologiilor, a rezultatelor de cercetare, a textelor, a argumentelor, a datelor, a reprezentărilor ... sau a oricărei alte forme de creație intelectuală a unei alte persoane ... prezentându-le fără drept ca fiind o creație personală.

artifacts.title: University of Bucharest AI Policy Evidence - Staged Crawl Draft
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence found an official AI4UB initiative page and the official University of Bucharest ethics code. No direct binding generative-AI assessment policy was found in the official sources checked, so AI claims are scoped to the AI4UB initiative and workshops while academic-integrity claims are drawn from the ethics code.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged AI4UB source supports initiative and education-program claims only; it does not establish a binding University of Bucharest generative-AI use policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
